description.value:
Years of practice leaping from kvash to kvash, kicking off of walls, and racing your peers through the canopy weren't just good fun, they've translated wonderfully into close combat. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Wall Jump] skill feat. You can use Wall Jump to make additional jumps off of creatures your size or larger as if they were walls. Once per turn, when you make an additional jump off a creature in this way, you can also attempt to [[/act shove]] or [[/act trip]] that creature as a free action.

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Leaping Expertise], you can jump off a wall to increase your fly Speed by 10 when using a jetpack or jump jet.
